title: Refactor: Introduce repository pattern
original_text: Refactored data access layer to use repository pattern. Created UserRepository, OrderRepository, and ProductRepository interfaces. Implemented repository classes with CRUD operations. Abstraction allows easy switching between data sources. Added unit tests for repositories. Updated services to use repositories. Result: 47 tests pass.
expected_subject: refactor(data): introduce repository pattern for data access
expected_body_lines: - Implement CRUD operations in repository classes
- Abstract data source for easy switching
- Update services to use repository pattern
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(data): introduce repository pattern for data access"
